llm.text_preview: eval harness: 9 arms x 8 seeds; primary=confirmed; matched=False

notes: Arm 'oracle' excluded from budget matching (cost ceiling/control): its actuals are recorded in per_arm but do not gate `matched`.
Arm 'long_context' excluded from budget matching (cost ceiling/control): its actuals are recorded in per_arm but do not gate `matched`.
Arm 'aa' excluded from budget matching (cost ceiling/control): its actuals are recorded in per_arm but do not gate `matched`.
Budgets not matched within tolerance 0.150; Pareto frontier is the reported artifact (FR5.2).

coverage_notes: ran 9 arms x 8 seeds = 72 runs; no cells dropped

prereg.hypothesis_h0: At matched budget, full_dream does not improve final ACC over no_sleep: the paired per-seed ACC difference has a bootstrap 95% CI that includes zero, OR the observed effect does not exceed the A/A noise floor.
prereg.hypothesis_h1: At matched LLM-token, retrieval-call, and final-memory-vector budgets, the full four-operator dream cycle (REPLAY + TRANSFER + DOWNSCALE + GENERATIVE-AUGMENT, the `full_dream` arm) yields HIGHER final Average Accuracy (ACC) on the held-out probe set than the no-sleep wake-only baseline (`no_sleep`) on a distractor-heavy continual task stream, with the paired per-seed ACC difference (full_dream - no_sleep) strictly positive and its bootstrap 95% CI excluding zero.
negative_result_forms: Dreaming is not greater than replay-only at matched budget (effect isolates to mere re-exposure).
Neither biological metaphor carries the effect (replay x downscale 2x2: both main-effect CIs include zero).
Generative augmentation degrades precise retrieval past an augmentation-volume threshold.
Long-context wins below stream length L (consolidation only beats stuff-it-in-context beyond a crossover).
Gating is unnecessary (continuous online writes match gated writes once decay + protection are present).
Adaptive sleep pressure is not greater than fixed cycles (the added controller is unjustified).
prereg.power_analysis: Following Colas, Sigaud & Oudeyer (2018): for a paired design the required n scales with (z_{1-alpha/2} + z_{1-beta})^2 / d^2 for standardized effect d. To detect a medium standardized paired effect (d ~ 0.8) at alpha = 0.05 (two-sided) with power 0.8 needs ~15 paired seeds; a large effect (d ~ 1.3) needs ~7. We commit to >= 5 as the floor and scale toward >= 15 in Phase 5 if the observed dispersion implies a smaller effect, logging the realized power. N is justified by this analysis, never by convenience.
prereg.primary_endpoint_description: The paired difference in final Average Accuracy (ACC = mean of the last row of R[i,j]) between the full_dream treatment arm and the no_sleep baseline arm, paired by seed (each seed fixes both the stream-generation seed and the agent/LLM sampling seed), aggregated as the mean paired difference over seeds. Reported with a bootstrap 95% CI, a paired Wilcoxon signed-rank test, and a standardized paired effect size (Cohen's d) with CI. The effect must also exceed the A/A noise floor (the absolute ACC difference between two seeds of the reference arm) to count as confirmed.
rejection_criteria: REJECT H0 (confirm H1) iff the mean paired ACC difference (full_dream - no_sleep) is positive, its bootstrap 95% CI excludes zero, the paired Wilcoxon p-value is below the Holm-corrected family-wise alpha (0.05), AND the effect magnitude exceeds the A/A noise floor.
FAIL TO REJECT H0 (refute H1 in this regime) if the bootstrap 95% CI of the paired difference includes zero, or the effect does not exceed the A/A noise floor.
Declare INCONCLUSIVE only if the matched-budget controller could not equalize budgets within tolerance (so the contrast is confounded by compute) and only a Pareto comparison is available.
prereg.seed_plan: At least 5 seeds per arm (Phase 4/5 floor; FR5.4). Each seed deterministically derives BOTH the stream-generation seed and the agent/LLM sampling seed via derive_seed, so seed variability captures both stream and sampling sources. Pairing is by seed across arms (a paired design maximizes power per Colas et al. 2018). Phase 5 may increase the seed count if the power analysis below requires it; it may never decrease below 5.
tests: Paired Wilcoxon signed-rank test on the per-seed ACC differences (primary).
Bootstrap 95% percentile CI on the mean paired ACC difference.
Standardized paired effect size (Cohen's d) with bootstrap CI.
Friedman omnibus across all arms + Holm-corrected post-hoc arm-vs-baseline.
rliable IQM / performance profiles / probability of improvement (robust aggregates).
Holm-Bonferroni multiple-comparison correction across the arm-vs-control family.
A/A control: two seeds of the reference arm must show NO significant difference (noise floor).
prereg.title: Does scheduled, offline, sleep-like memory consolidation improve long-horizon accuracy for frozen-weights LLM agents, at matched budget?

primary_endpoint.description: The paired difference in final Average Accuracy (ACC = mean of the last row of R[i,j]) between the full_dream treatment arm and the no_sleep baseline arm, paired by seed (each seed fixes both the stream-generation seed and the agent/LLM sampling seed), aggregated as the mean paired difference over seeds. Reported with a bootstrap 95% CI, a paired Wilcoxon signed-rank test, and a standardized paired effect size (Cohen's d) with CI. The effect must also exceed the A/A noise floor (the absolute ACC difference between two seeds of the reference arm) to count as confirmed.
primary_endpoint.name: acc_diff_full_dream_vs_no_sleep
